use_cases: Login and registration forms with interactive hover spotlight effects
Search inputs requiring enhanced visual feedback on focus
Contact and feedback forms with polished micro-interactions
Any text input field needing a modern animated aesthetic
Dark-themed interfaces requiring subtle gradient enhancements
ai_summary: An animated input component featuring a radial gradient spotlight effect that follows the mouse cursor, built with GSAP for smooth transitions. The input displays a blue (#3b82f6) gradient on hover that expands from the cursor position with a 100px radius, providing enhanced visual feedback. Uses React hooks and refs for state management and integrates seamlessly into dark-themed interfaces for modern form styling.
